channel.title: Cultif Journal
channel.description: Food culture, meal planning, creator guides, and global recipes from Cultif.

item.title: Jollof Rice Is More Than a Recipe
item.description: A cultural guide to West African jollof rice, the regional styles behind it, and how to build a meal around it.

item.title: How to Meal Plan Without Eating the Same Thing All Week
item.description: Use cultural themes to make weekly meal planning more varied, more useful, and much less repetitive.

item.title: The Best Creator Recipes Teach Context
item.description: Why food creators should share technique, origin, substitutions, and serving ideas alongside the recipe itself.

item.title: Balanced Plates Do Not Have to Be Bland
item.description: A practical way to build nutritious meals using global flavors, smart portions, and satisfying textures.
